summary: BLOCK 453 & 455: Discogs OAuth 1.0a Integration & Security Migration Modal - All features verified. Fixed missing discogs_migration_dismissed field in UserResponse to enable profile reconnect banner.

code_warnings.issue: Nested button inside button HTML warning (pre-existing)
Nested anchor inside anchor HTML warning (pre-existing)
Missing DialogTitle accessibility warning from Radix UI (cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 453 VERIFIED: GET /api/discogs/oauth/start returns authorization_url with oauth_token for authenticated users
BLOCK 453 VERIFIED: POST /api/discogs/connect-token returns 400 with 'Manual Discogs connection is no longer supported' message
BLOCK 453 VERIFIED: GET /api/discogs/status returns connected, discogs_username, oauth_verified, auth_type, needs_migration fields
BLOCK 455 VERIFIED: POST /api/discogs/dismiss-migration sets discogs_migration_dismissed=true on user document
BLOCK 455 VERIFIED: GET /api/auth/me includes needs_discogs_migration (computed), discogs_oauth_verified, and discogs_migration_dismissed fields
BLOCK 455 VERIFIED: GET /api/discogs/imposter-flags returns 403 for non-admin users, accessible to admin
FRONTEND VERIFIED: DiscogsSecurityModal renders with 'Security Update' headline, Shield icon, explanation text, 'Reconnect Now' gold button, 'Connect Later' ghost button
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Migration modal triggers automatically when user.needs_discogs_migration is true on login
FRONTEND VERIFIED: 'Connect Later' button calls /discogs/dismiss-migration and closes modal
FRONTEND VERIFIED: DiscogsImport shows 'Re-verify' badge when status.needs_migration is true
FRONTEND VERIFIED: DiscogsImport shows 'Reconnect via OAuth' button with warning message for users needing migration
FRONTEND VERIFIED: No manual username input field exists in DiscogsImport (OAuth-only flow)
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Profile page shows reconnect warning banner ('Your Discogs connection needs re-verification. Reconnect now') for users who dismissed migration
FIX APPLIED: Added discogs_migration_dismissed field to UserResponse model and _build_user_response function to enable profile reconnect banner
seed_data_creation: Test user already configured with discogs_username='olduser123', auth_type='personal_token', no oauth_token
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 453/455 fully verified. Test user (testuser1) has Discogs connected via old personal_token method, triggering migration flow. DiscogsSecurityModal shows on login when needs_discogs_migration=true. After clicking 'Connect Later', discogs_migration_dismissed=true is set, modal won't re-show, but profile page shows reconnect banner. OAuth flow tested to return authorization_url correctly (full OAuth callback requires real Discogs authorization). Key files modified: models.py (added discogs_migration_dismissed to UserResponse), auth.py (added field to _build_user_response).

oauth_start_endpoint.details: GET /api/discogs/oauth/start returns authorization_url with discogs.com and oauth_token

connect_token_deprecated.details: POST /api/discogs/connect-token returns 400 'Manual Discogs connection is no longer supported'

discogs_status_fields.details: Returns connected, discogs_username, oauth_verified, auth_type, needs_migration

dismiss_migration_endpoint.details: POST /api/discogs/dismiss-migration sets flag and returns {dismissed: true}

imposter_flags_admin_only.details: Returns 403 for non-admin, 200 with list for admin

security_modal_ui.details: Modal shows Security Update headline, Shield icon, Reconnect Now gold button, Connect Later ghost button

modal_trigger_on_login.details: Modal triggers when user.needs_discogs_migration is true

discogs_import_badges.details: Shows 'Re-verify' badge for needs_migration, 'Verified' badge for oauth_verified

no_manual_username_input.details: DiscogsImport has no manual username field, OAuth-only flow

profile_reconnect_banner.details: Shows 'Your Discogs connection needs re-verification. Reconnect now' for dismissed users (after fix)

fix_applied.root_cause: discogs_migration_dismissed field was not included in UserResponse model or _build_user_response
fix_applied.fix: Added discogs_migration_dismissed: bool = False to models.py UserResponse and included in auth.py _build_user_response
